UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Monica Dib of Wright, Finlay & Zak (949-477-5050) CourtCall appearance for defendant GMC Mortgage Inc. moving party. No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to third cause of action for wrongful foreclosure and fifth cause of action for quiet title to allege all elements of these causes of action. No opposition filed. Defendant's Counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Monica Dib of Wright, Finlay & Zak (949-477-5050) CourtCall appearance for defendant GMC Mortgage Inc. opposing party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend. Defendant's Counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
